events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed: the operator's reasoning is invalid — TTY (torque-to-yield) bolts are single-use because the angle-tightening step plastically deforms the fastener past its elastic limit, so any reuse (regardless of cycle count) creates unpredictable clamp load and failure risk. Wrote `decision: fail`, `risk: high` with corrective actions (replace with new bolts, redo torque+angle sequence, log nonconformance) to `/app/answer.json`.
